subject: [DCAEGEN2] Deploy DCAEGEN2-PMSH Microservices to Helm
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Deploy DCAEGEN2-PMSH Microservices to Helm

  - Charts for microservices are found under
  - oom/kubernetes/dcaegen2-services/dcae-pmsh

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2713
Signed-off-by: ajay_dp001 <ajay.deep.singh@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ia9178f4aa2f699bbc9767128a9bb4eab2149a531

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

(6 comments)

Dint have chance to run this locally - noted some preliminary comments

Btw Jack noted he is almost done with updates to support option to specify an environment variable using a secret created by OOM common; once that is submitted, this patch may need to be revised accordingly to change how PG config are sourced

Patch Set 3:

(6 comments)

> Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1
> 
> (6 comments)
> 
> Dint have chance to run this locally - noted some preliminary comments
> 
> Btw Jack noted he is almost done with updates to support option to specify an environment variable using a secret created by OOM common; once that is submitted, this patch may need to be revised accordingly to change how PG config are sourced

> Hi Vijay, Thanks for comments.
> I am in communication with Jack on same, from PMSH charts we identified the requirement of having generic way of handling env-variables, configMap, it will be good if we keep Jira for updating common templates open until all the micro-service are migrated, there might be more changes coming in as we migrate other servies.

> Once Jack changes are up will get this PR rebase.

Hi Morgan,
Dcae helm chart failure is not related to changes of this PR.

Able to reproduce issue in local setup, everytime I encounter similar error with dummy Pod manifest yaml one like below, if we change memory: 50Mib to 50Mi it works fine.

I dont know the reason why the issue started showing up now and not earlier, this is somthing OOM guys will be more aware of if its related to kubectl version, I tested this on :
+ kubectl version --short
Client Version: v1.19.7
Server Version: v1.19.7

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: test-pod
  namespace: default
spec:
  containers:
  - name: pause
    image: gcr.io/google_containers/pause:2.0
    resources:
      limits:
        cpu: 1
        memory: 50Mib

+ kubectl create -f test-pod.yaml
Error from server (BadRequest): error when creating "test-pod.yaml": Pod in version "v1" cannot be handled as a Pod: v1.Pod.Spec: v1.PodSpec.Containers: []v1.Container: v1.Container.Resources: v1.ResourceRequirements.Limits: unmarshalerDecoder: quantities must match the regular expression '^([+-]?[0-9.]+)([eEinumkKMGTP]*[-+]?[0-9]*)$', error found in #10 byte of ...|y":"50Mib"}}}]}}
|..., bigger context ...|e","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":1,"memory":"50Mib"}}}]}}

As I pointed earlier this PR: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/121062 should resolve issue we will wait for it to get merge and then dcae helm chart should not fail.
